summary: Phase 2 features for SportLyo tested successfully. All 14 backend tests passed, all UI components verified. New features: Check-in page, Export timing CSV, Results page category filter all working correctly.
passed_tests: Test 1: Organizer dashboard shows Check-in button (Scan icon) for each event - PASSED (8 buttons found)
Test 2: Organizer dashboard shows Export timing button (Download icon) for each event - PASSED (8 buttons found)
Test 3: Organizer dashboard shows Results button (BarChart3 icon) for each event - PASSED
Test 4: Check-in page loads at /organizer/checkin/{eventId} - PASSED
Test 5: Check-in page shows stats (Inscrits, Pointés, Restants) - PASSED
Test 6: Check-in page has scanner input and button - PASSED
Test 7: Check-in page shows progress bar - PASSED
Test 8: POST /api/checkin/scan requires authentication - PASSED
Test 9: POST /api/checkin/scan requires organizer role - PASSED
Test 10: POST /api/checkin/scan validates bib_number/registration_id - PASSED
Test 11: GET /api/checkin/stats/{event_id} returns correct structure - PASSED
Test 12: Results page loads at /results/{eventId} - PASSED
Test 13: Results page shows race filter dropdown - PASSED
Test 14: Results page has Auto-refresh toggle - PASSED
Test 15: Results page has Refresh button - PASSED
Test 16: GET /api/timing/results/{event_id} supports ?category= filter - PASSED
Test 17: GET /api/timing/results/{event_id} returns categories list - PASSED
Test 18: Export timing CSV button triggers download - PASSED
Test 19: GET /api/organizer/events/{event_id}/export-timing returns CSV - PASSED
Test 20: CSV contains correct headers (BibNumber, FirstName, LastName, RFID, Gender, Category, Race, Email) - PASSED
Test 21: App.js has route /organizer/checkin/:eventId -> CheckInPage - PASSED
context_for_next_testing_agent: Phase 2 testing complete. All new features verified: 1) Organizer dashboard has 6 action buttons per event: View, Edit, Check-in (Scan icon), Export timing (Download icon), Results (BarChart3), Delete. 2) Check-in page at /organizer/checkin/:eventId shows stats (Inscrits/Pointés/Restants), progress bar, scanner input. 3) POST /api/checkin/scan accepts {bib_number: ...} or {registration_id: ...}. 4) Results page at /results/:eventId has category filter dropdown (only shows when categories exist). 5) Export timing CSV download works via GET /api/organizer/events/{event_id}/export-timing.

mocked_apis.RFID_integration: POST /api/rfid-read is simulated - no real hardware connection (MOCKED)

phase_2_features_tested: Organizer dashboard action buttons: Check-in, Export timing, Results
Check-in page with stats, scanner input, progress bar
action_buttons_per_event: Scan icon - Check-in page (NEW in Phase 2)
Download icon - Export timing CSV (NEW in Phase 2)
BarChart3 icon - Results page (enhanced in Phase 2)
